originalTitle: History Suggests the Market Could Crash in 2026: Here's How You Can Protect Your Portfolio Right Now
summary: The Shiller P/E ratio -- also known as the cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings (CAPE) ratio -- is flashing a rare warning sign.
content: The Shiller P/E ratio -- also known as the cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings (CAPE) ratio -- is flashing a rare warning sign.
chineseTitle: 历史表明市场可能在 2026 年崩溃：以下是您现在可以保护您的投资组合的方法
chineseSummary: 希勒市盈率——也称为周期性调整市盈率（CAPE）——正在闪烁着罕见的警告信号。
chineseContent: 希勒市盈率——也称为周期性调整市盈率（CAPE）——正在闪烁着罕见的警告信号。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
